series_metadata.series_title: Excise & Energy Tax Cigarette, Other Tobacco Products & MSA Assess Files
series_metadata.series_description: These files are for assessments related to cigarette, other tobacco producs and Master Settlement Agreement. The files contain the recommendatin for assessment, the notice of assessment, the audit work papers, and related correspondence/documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Destroy 3 yrs after the end of the calendar year in which payment is received or assessment was cancelled or until as the diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved for a particular year. ; Electronic: Destroy 3 yrs after the end of the calendar year in which payment is received or assessment was cancelled or until as the diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved for a particular year., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
